title: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMSS)
description: Scholarship for meritorious students of economically weaker sections to prevent dropouts at class 8.
benefits: ₹12,000 per annum from class 9 to 12.

title: PM-USP (Scholarship for College Students)
description: Financial assistance to meritorious students from low-income families for higher studies.
benefits: ₹12,000/year for graduation and ₹20,000/year for post-graduation.

title: PM-Vidyalaxmi
description: Collateral-free and guarantor-free education loans for meritorious students in top institutions.
benefits: Loans up to ₹10 lakh with interest subvention.

title: Central Sector Interest Subsidy (CSIS)
description: Interest subsidy on education loans for technical and professional courses.
benefits: Full interest subsidy during the moratorium period on loans.

title: PM-YASASVI Scholarship
description: Scholarship for students belonging to OBC, EBC, and DNT categories.
benefits: ₹75,000 to ₹1,25,000 per annum for schools and colleges.

title: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
description: Promoting apprenticeship training and increasing engagement of apprentices.
benefits: Stipend support and reimbursement to industries.

title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Savings scheme for the girl child to meet education and marriage expenses.
benefits: High interest rate savings and tax benefits.

title: PM CARES for Children
description: Support for children who lost both parents to COVID-19.
benefits: Monthly stipend, ₹10 lakh corpus at age 23, and education support.

title: Pragati Scholarship for Girls
description: Assisting girls to pursue technical education (Degree/Diploma).
benefits: ₹50,000 per annum for duration of study.

title: Saksham Scholarship
description: Technical education support for specially-abled students.
benefits: ₹50,000 per annum for technical studies.

title: National Overseas Scholarship
description: Support for students from SC and landless agricultural laborer families to study abroad.
benefits: Full tuition fees and maintenance allowance for study abroad.

title: INSPIRE Scholarship
description: Scholarship for top science students to pursue higher science education.
benefits: ₹80,000 per year for students of basic sciences.

title: Post-Matric Scholarship for Minorities
description: Financial support for students from minority communities for studies beyond class 10.
benefits: Admission/Tuition fee and maintenance allowance.

title: Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana (KVPY)
description: Fellowship program to encourage students to take up research in basic sciences.
benefits: Generous fellowship and contingency grant up to PhD level.

title: Junior Research Fellowship (NET-JRF)
description: Financial assistance to candidates for pursuing research in various subjects.
benefits: Stipend of ₹37,000+ per month for research.

title: SSP Post-Matric Scholarship
description: Comprehensive scholarship portal for SC/ST/OBC/Minority students.
benefits: Tuition fee reimbursement and monthly stipend.

title: Vidyasiri (Food & Accommodation)
description: Maintenance allowance for OBC/EBC students who don't get hostel seats.
benefits: ₹15,000 per academic year for food and stay.

title: Arivu Education Loan Scheme
description: Low-interest education loans for minority students pursuing professional courses.
benefits: Loans up to ₹50,000 to ₹1,00,000 at 2% interest per annum.

title: Prabuddha Overseas Scholarship
description: Scholarship for SC/ST students to study in top global universities.
benefits: Full scholarship covering tuition, living, and travel costs.

title: Free Laptops for SC/ST Students
description: Free laptop distribution for college students from SC/ST communities.
benefits: Zero-cost laptop for undergraduate and postgraduate studies.

title: Incentive for SSLC & 2nd PUC (Minority)
description: Cash prize for high scorers in board exams from minority communities.
benefits: Cash prize of ₹10,000 to ₹20,000 for high percentage scorers.

title: PhD Fellowship (Social Welfare Board)
description: Monthly fellowship for PhD students from backward classes.
benefits: ₹10,000 per month for research work.

title: SSP Pre-Matric Scholarship
description: Scholarship for students from class 1 to 10.
benefits: Maintenance and book grant for school students.

title: Chief Minister’s Kaushalya Karnataka (CMKKY)
description: Skill training for youth to improve employability.
benefits: Free skill training and certification in various trades.

title: Kittur Rani Chennamma Award
description: Incentive for girl students who excel in PU exams and belong to poor families.
benefits: Cash award and certificate of excellence.

title: Samriddhi Scheme (SC/ST Startups)
description: Support for SC/ST students to become entrepreneurs through franchise models.
benefits: Grant of up to ₹10 lakh to start a business or franchise.

title: Free Cycle Scheme
description: Distribution of free cycles to school students in rural areas.
benefits: Free bicycle for commuting to school.

title: D. Devaraj Urs Foreign Education Scholarship
description: Overseas scholarship for students from backward classes.
benefits: Up to ₹10 lakh for overseas post-graduate studies.

title: Adarsha Vidyalaya Entrance Fellowship
description: Special support for students admitted to Adarsha Vidyalayas (English Medium schools).
benefits: Quality education and support material for rural students.

title: Vidyasiri Rural Hostel maintenance
description: Special maintenance for students in rural hosteling facilities.
benefits: Increased maintenance allowance and quality food.
